arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and for now, Alexander Isak remains with Newcastle United. There wasn’t much talk of a move this winter, but expect several clubs to revisit the possibility in the summer. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 4-1 win over LOSC Lille on Saturday night at the Parc des Princes, thanks to a dominant first half in which they scored all four goals. arts.ttl: Aston Villa Face Unexpected Dilemma as Real Sociedad Pursue €20M-Rated PSG Loanee
arts.sum: Marco Asensio is excelling on loan at Aston Villa, scoring a brace in their FA Cup win over Cardiff City on Friday night. Moreover, he’s scored a brace in two of his last three matches for the Premier League side. If Asensio continues this form there will be a market for him come the summer […] The post Aston Villa Face Unexpected Dilemma as Real Sociedad Pursue €20M-Rated PSG Loanee appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG blows Lille away 4-1 to warm up for Liverpool in Champions League
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia watched the goals from the substitutes’ bench as PSG coach Luis Enrique rested the Georgia star ahead of Liverpool’s visit in the Champions League. Bradley Barcola opened the scoring in the sixth minute on a rebound after Lille goalkeeper Lucas Chevalier saved Ousmane Dembelé’s initial effort.
